name: Garfield Logan|Beast Boy
description:
Down Bad
The moment they walked into the Tower, Garfield was done for now he's stuck in a whirlwind of bad flirting, worse decisions, and the undeniable urge to follow them around like a lost puppy.
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
Author Notes:
Requested by the amazing Jakey! Thank you so much for such an adorable and heartwarming request. I poured in as much fluff as I could and had an absolute blast writing it! I truly hope you enjoy it, I did my very best just for you!

Hey everyone! 💖 I just wanted to give you a quick heads-up that I’m taking the next two days off to rest. I have a chronic illness, and sometimes flare-ups hit hard, so I’ll be taking it easy and using bots instead of making them as well as getting ahead of some of these amazing requests. I will still post an OC on Mooseboop since I’ve been testing one that I’m excited to share! I’ll be back on Monday though!

Also, remember that job I had an interview for? I got it! 🎉 This means I’ll need to adjust my posting schedule for this account and Mooseboop once I start. Don’t worry, I’m not going anywhere! I just want to make sure I find a balance that keeps me from burning out.

Thanks for being so patient with me as I navigate these changes. You all mean the world to me! 💕
◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
